workflow.name: Set Up Locomotion Blend Space
workflow.description: Create a 2D blend space for character locomotion that blends between idle, walk, and run animations based on speed and direction.
prerequisites: Idle, walk, and run animation sequences imported

steps.purpose: Verify the skeleton asset and its bone hierarchy
List available animation sequences to find idle, walk, run
Check if a blend space already exists for this skeleton
Create a new BlendSpace asset for 2D locomotion
Configure blend space axes: X=Direction (-180 to 180), Y=Speed (0 to 600)
Create animation montage for special actions (jump, attack)
Compile to verify the animation setup

workflow.expectedOutcome: A 2D blend space that smoothly transitions between idle, walk, and run based on character speed and direction
